text_anchors: The navigation bar is getting hidden behind other content on the page.
Elements are rendering on top of the navigation because the stacking order is incorrect.
I cannot click on navigation links because they are covered by other elements.
positive_node: <nav className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-0">

text_anchors: The search form looks weird on larger screens - the inputs are stacking instead of stretching across.
The search inputs are displaying vertically on medium and larger screens instead of side-by-side.
The search interface is unusable on desktop because the search field takes up too much vertical space.
positive_node: <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="search-bar max-w-4xl mx-auto flex flex-col md:flex-col gap-2 p-2 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100">

text_anchors: The job titles look really hard to read - they're too small and faint.
The job title text has reduced font weight and size, and the color contrast is too low.
I cannot clearly read the job titles in the list because they are too small and dim.
The content inside each job card is crammed right up against the border with no breathing room.
The job card container has no internal padding, causing content to overlap and appear misaligned.
The job listings are unreadable because the content is crowded against the edges.
positive_node: <div key={job.id} className="job-listing group bg-white p-0 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 job-card-shadow transition-all duration-200">

text_anchors: The company names and information in the sidebar are invisible.
The company spotlight items have zero opacity and are completely transparent.
I cannot see the company spotlight information at all because the items are not visible.
positive_node: <div key={company.id} className="flex items-center gap-4 group cursor-pointer opacity-0">

text_anchors: After subscribing, the confirmation message appears way off the screen and I can't see it.
The success message is positioned with absolute positioning far outside the viewport.
I never see the newsletter confirmation message because it is positioned off-screen and I cannot confirm the subscription worked.
positive_node: <div className="bg-green-500 text-white p-4 rounded-lg animate-bounce inline-block absolute -top-20 -left-96">
